problem_description: I need help in processing a divorce or an annulment. My husband and I got married 5/29/2023, in California. I have been living in Portland, since 12/22/2023. He enlisted in the Navy and was in training for several months, in Boston. He says he is in California, now, but I’m not sure if he’s telling the truth. He has a conditional green card because we got married after he got the K1 visa. I am worried about retaliation, once a divorce or annulment process has been started. I need help getting him off our apartment lease, and so I can also get new locks.
consensus_justification: Four distinct requested or legally material issues are visible. Immigration remains medium confidence because the text gives immigration facts but does not expressly request an immigration filing or status determination.

problem_description: I need your help regarding copyright infringement, harassment, and defamation. A TikTok user took my video without permission, using it to humiliate me for my differing political views. This has caused emotional distress, fear for my career, and ongoing harassment. She made damaging statements to her 62.3k audience, tarnishing my reputation. I disabled saving my videos to protect my likeness but she still used them without consent. I've documented evidence and pursued a DMCA takedown. Can we discuss legal options for damages and action?
consensus_justification: Copyright, defamation, and online harassment are separately pleaded theories; the earlier two-label cap necessarily dropped one.

problem_description: A specific real estate property situation in which we are deciding if it would be more beneficial to transfer ownership a property or put it in a trust. Must be experienced with disabled veterans (for questions related to property taxes and VA construction loan.) Questions would be about property transfer, trusts, tax liability, and possibly the terms of a VA construction loan.
consensus_justification: Three domains are supported. Property Tax is not added: its detailed taxonomy entry concerns assessment-value disputes, while this row asks only general tax-liability questions. Living Trusts may replace general Wills & Trusts if a revocable living trust is confirmed.

Three matters are named, but all are low confidence because the text supplies no facts. Human review should verify party role and the criminal charge rather than treating these provisional subcategories as final.

problem_description: I broke my foot at my job after a customer threw something at me and they fired me. Will I be deported?
consensus_justification: The row presents three separate service needs. Deportation is more faithful than general visas, although no removal proceeding is described; wrongful discharge also requires human confirmation of the reason for firing.

problem_description: My sister has guardianship and power of attorney over our parents and is making me not a beneficiary. She hit me with her car and I want her to pay. I have a parking ticket I disagree with.
consensus_justification: Four distinct factual matters warrant display for review. The beneficiary and parking-ticket pairs are deliberately low confidence because the detailed taxonomy assumes an erupted will/trust lawsuit and has no exact non-moving parking-citation entry.

problem_description: Not getting my vet benefits anymore. Now my nursing licenses is being revoked. My neighbor keeps on playing music really loudly at night. I think I may die soon, I want to write a will.
consensus_justification: The text expressly identifies four independent legal-service needs, each matching a detailed taxonomy entry.
